name: llama-vscode-chat
description: Use local models, DeepSeek, Codex, and Claude subscriptions in VS Code Chat with native tools, context control, and diagnostics.

llamacpp.serverUrl.description: Primary OpenAI-compatible server URL. Kept for backward compatibility; local and DeepSeek sources can also be enabled separately.

llamacpp.enableLocalServer.description: Also advertise models from a local OpenAI-compatible llama.cpp server without switching the primary server URL.

llamacpp.localServerUrl.description: Local OpenAI-compatible llama.cpp server URL advertised alongside DeepSeek or the primary server.

llamacpp.localContextLength.description: Fallback context length for the dedicated local server source when runtime metadata is unavailable.

llamacpp.enableDeepSeek.description: Also advertise DeepSeek models from https://api.deepseek.com when an API key is configured.

llamacpp.deepSeekContextLength.description: Maximum context window advertised for DeepSeek models. This is independent of the local llama.cpp/Qwen server context.

llamacpp.enableCodexSubscription.description: Advertise OpenAI Codex models backed by the ChatGPT account managed by the official local Codex app-server.

llamacpp.codexCliPath.description: Optional path to the Codex CLI executable. Empty uses the CLI bundled with the official OpenAI VS Code extension, then falls back to codex on PATH.

llamacpp.codexContextLength.description: Context window advertised for Codex models. The default matches the context reported by the current Codex app-server runtime.

llamacpp.codexMaxInputChars.description: Maximum serialized VS Code conversation characters sent in one Codex turn. Older middle messages are omitted first, leaving headroom below the Codex app-server hard input limit.

llamacpp.codexMaxToolResultChars.description: Maximum characters retained from each historical VS Code tool result before Codex conversation serialization. Preserves more user and assistant history in long chats.

llamacpp.codexDeferNonCoreTools.description: Keep core coding tools immediately visible to Codex and load uncommon Copilot tool schemas on demand through Codex tool search. Reduces repeated prompt tokens when many tools are installed.

llamacpp.codexMaxOutputTokens.description: Output reserve advertised to VS Code for Codex models. Codex still applies the selected model and subscription limits.

llamacpp.codexReasoningEffort.description: Default Codex reasoning effort. Auto prefers High when the selected model supports it; the native per-chat Thinking Effort selector takes precedence.

llamacpp.codexReasoningSummary.description: Reasoning summary detail streamed by Codex into the native thinking section when supported by VS Code.

llamacpp.codexFastServiceTier.description: Use the Codex priority service tier when the selected model offers it. This is faster but consumes subscription usage more quickly.

llamacpp.codexEphemeralThreads.description: Keep VS Code-backed Codex runtime threads ephemeral because Copilot Chat owns durable history. Active matching chats still reuse their in-memory thread for cache-efficient incremental turns.

llamacpp.enableClaudeSubscription.description: Advertise Claude subscription models through the official Claude Agent SDK. Built-in Claude Code tools are disabled; actions are delegated to native VS Code Chat tools.

llamacpp.claudeContextLength.description: Maximum Claude context window advertised to VS Code. When the Agent SDK reports a larger raw model window, this value remains the effective cap.

llamacpp.claudeMaxOutputTokens.description: Maximum output tokens advertised for Claude models. Anthropic still applies per-model limits.

llamacpp.claudeMaxInputChars.description: Maximum serialized VS Code conversation characters used to initialize a new Claude session. Warm turns send only the latest user message.

llamacpp.claudeReasoningEffort.description: Default Claude reasoning effort. The model picker exposes native per-chat Low/Medium/High choices, plus Extra High/Max on supported Opus and Fable models.

llamacpp.claudeCliPath.description: Absolute path to the Claude Code CLI binary. Leave empty to use the binary bundled with the official 'anthropic.claude-code' extension.

llamacpp.contextLength.description: Optional runtime context override, for example --ctx-size 65536. When not explicitly set, the provider infers context from runtime metadata (for example /slots on llama.cpp or /models metadata on DeepSeek).

llamacpp.modelFamily.description: Model family advertised to VS Code Chat. Use auto to infer from model id, or set a value like qwen, llama, mistral, deepseek, gemma, or phi.

llamacpp.modelListCacheTtlMs.description: How long to cache model discovery results in milliseconds. Set to 0 to disable model list caching.

llamacpp.modelDiscoveryTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for model discovery calls (/v1/models or /models, plus runtime context probing) in milliseconds. Lower this if model loading appears to hang on remote endpoints.

llamacpp.autoCompact.description: Automatically compact old chat history before sending requests when close to context limit.

llamacpp.copilotCompactionFastMode.description: Use a fast no-reasoning profile for Copilot Chat's internal conversation-summary requests. Normal chat requests are unaffected.

llamacpp.copilotCompactionMaxTokens.description: Maximum output tokens for a recognized Copilot Chat internal conversation summary when copilotCompactionFastMode is enabled.

llamacpp.accurateTokenCounting.description: Use llama.cpp /apply-template and /tokenize for model-exact prompt counts. Falls back to local estimation when unsupported.

llamacpp.tokenizerTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for non-generating /apply-template and /tokenize requests used by accurate context accounting.

llamacpp.retryOnContextOverflow.description: Retry once with hard compaction when server reports context overflow.

llamacpp.emptyResponseAutoRetry.description: Automatically retry with an internal continuation prompt when a turn ends with no visible text and no tool calls.

llamacpp.emptyResponseAutoRetryMaxAttemp.description: Maximum automatic continuation retries for empty model responses per turn.

llamacpp.toolCallOnlyAutoretry.description: Automatically inject a task-summary nudge when the model makes tool calls without any text for several consecutive turns.

llamacpp.toolCallOnlyAutoretryThreshold.description: Number of consecutive tool-call-only turns before triggering an automatic task-summary nudge.

llamacpp.toolCallRepairEnabled.description: Repair conservative tool-call JSON/name mistakes and retry one rejected tool call before failing the chat turn.

llamacpp.validateToolCallSchema.description: Validate model tool-call arguments against the exact schema advertised in the request before VS Code executes the tool.

llamacpp.toolCallRepairMaxAttempts.description: Maximum model correction retries after a malformed, unknown, or schema-invalid tool call.

llamacpp.toolLoopProtection.description: Detect consecutive identical tool calls in conversation history and instruct the model to change approach instead of repeating them.

llamacpp.toolLoopDetectionThreshold.description: Number of consecutive identical tool calls that activates loop protection.

llamacpp.emptyResponseContinuationPrompt.default: Continue from your previous response and complete the answer. Do not repeat already completed parts.
llamacpp.emptyResponseContinuationPrompt.description: Internal prompt appended for empty-response auto-retry continuation.

llamacpp.contextUtilization.description: Soft context budget ratio used before compaction.

llamacpp.hardContextUtilization.description: Hard context budget ratio used for overflow retry compaction.

llamacpp.compactKeepLastTurns.description: Number of most recent non-system messages to keep during normal compaction.

llamacpp.hardCompactKeepLastTurns.description: Number of recent non-system messages to keep during hard compaction retry.

llamacpp.maxOutputTokensCap.description: Hard cap for max_tokens sent to server. Set to 393216 for maximum DeepSeek V4 output.

llamacpp.localDefaultMaxOutputTokens.description: Default max_tokens requested for local models when the chat session does not provide an explicit limit. The global maxOutputTokensCap remains the hard ceiling.

llamacpp.deepSeekDefaultMaxOutputTokens.description: Default max_tokens requested from DeepSeek when the chat session does not provide an explicit limit. Keeps normal turns below the 393216-token emergency ceiling.

llamacpp.minReplyReserveTokens.description: Minimum tokens reserved for reply budget when calculating input context budget.

llamacpp.maxToolsPerRequest.description: Maximum number of tools allowed in a single request for classic mode. In apiDirect mode, request-level cap is bypassed and apiDirectMaxTools is used.

llamacpp.requestTimeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout for chat completion requests in milliseconds.

llamacpp.requestQueueTimeoutMs.description: Maximum time a chat request can wait for the local llama.cpp request slot. Set to 0 to wait indefinitely.

llamacpp.transientRetryMaxAttempts.description: Additional pre-stream retries for network failures and HTTP 429, 502, 503, or 504 responses. Timeout and cancellation are never retried.

llamacpp.transientRetryBaseDelayMs.description: Base exponential backoff delay for transient request retries. Retry-After takes precedence when supplied by the server.

llamacpp.cachePrompt.description: Send cache_prompt=true to llama.cpp so repeated prompt prefixes can reuse the server-side KV cache when supported.

llamacpp.maxToolResultChars.description: Maximum characters per tool result sent to the model. Large tool outputs are truncated before they can overwhelm local context. Set to 0 to disable truncation.

llamacpp.summarizeLargeToolResults.description: When enabled, oversized tool results are replaced with a compact summary + preview instead of raw truncated payload. Helps reduce JSON/log bleed-through in model context.

llamacpp.sanitizeToolResultArtifacts.description: Strip known transient transport artifacts from tool output text (for example cache_control metadata blobs) before sending to the model.

llamacpp.toolCallingMode.description: Tool transport strategy: classic sends full tool schemas, apiDirect sends a compact prioritized subset to reduce token cost.

llamacpp.apiDirectMaxTools.description: Maximum number of prioritized tools included when toolCallingMode=apiDirect.

llamacpp.apiDirectIncludeAllTools.description: When toolCallingMode=apiDirect, include all advertised tools (up to apiDirectMaxTools) instead of prioritized subset.

llamacpp.apiDirectToolTokenBudget.description: Approximate token ceiling for compact apiDirect tool definitions. High-priority tools are kept first.

llamacpp.knowledgeMode.description: Knowledge verification policy: adaptive checks material changing or uncertain claims, strict requires source-backed verification for external technical claims, and off disables the built-in policy.

llamacpp.customSystemPrompt.markdownDescription: Optional stable instructions appended to the provider system policy. Keep frequently changing task context in chat or memory so the prompt prefix remains cache-friendly.

llamacpp.reasoningBudget.description: Maximum hidden reasoning tokens for compatible local servers. light uses up to 512, balanced up to 2048, and high/deep/auto use this cap. DeepSeek uses high/max effort instead of this numeric value.

llamacpp.preserveThinking.description: Preserve Qwen 3.6 reasoning traces across multi-step tool turns when supported by the server chat template. Disable to minimize context use.

llamacpp.toolResultMode.description: How tool results are sent back to model context: auto (prefer tool role, fallback to user), tool (always OpenAI tool role), user (always flattened user text).

llamacpp.memoryEnabled.description: Enable shared durable memory across chats, workspaces, local models, and DeepSeek.

llamacpp.memoryAutoInject.description: Automatically add relevant shared memory entries to each model request.

llamacpp.memoryMaxTokens.description: Maximum estimated tokens reserved for automatically injected shared memory.

llamacpp.enableFileLogging.description: Write detailed provider logs to a JSONL file in the extension global storage.

llamacpp.logStreamChunks.description: Include streaming response chunks in log files. Disabled by default because chunk logging duplicates generated text and adds overhead during long local generations.

llamacpp.maxLoggedStreamChunkChars.description: Maximum characters of each stream chunk to write when logStreamChunks is enabled. Set to 0 to log chunk metadata without text.

llamacpp.showPerformanceStatusBar.description: Show a status bar item with estimated llama.cpp throughput (tok/s) and turn latency from the latest chat response.

llamacpp.showContextUsageStatusBar.description: Show a status bar item with the latest llama.cpp context usage estimate and budget breakdown.

llamacpp.maxLogFiles.description: Maximum number of JSONL log files kept in the logs directory. Older files are removed automatically.

languageModelTools.name: llamacpp_store_memory
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Create or update a durable user-approved memory entry shared across VS Code chats, workspaces, local models, and DeepSeek. Use it for stable preferences, project decisions, environment facts, and reusable workflow knowledge. Do not store secrets, transient chat details, or guesses.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Save durable context for future chats and models.

id.description: Existing memory entry id to update. Omit to create a new entry.

title.description: Short descriptive title for the durable fact or decision.

content.description: Self-contained memory content that remains understandable in a future chat.

pinned.description: Prioritize this entry after it passes scope, expiry, and relevance checks.

scope.description: Where this memory applies. Workspace scopeId is filled automatically when omitted.

scopeId.description: Workspace URI or model id for non-global memory. Required for model scope.

kind.description: Semantic type. externalFact requires sourceUrl and verifiedAt.

sourceUrl.description: Primary source URL for an externally verified fact.

verifiedAt.description: ISO date/time when the external fact was verified.

expiresAt.description: Optional ISO date/time after which the entry is excluded from automatic retrieval.

languageModelTools.name: llamacpp_search_memory
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Search durable shared memory when exact prior preferences, project decisions, environment facts, or reusable workflow knowledge are needed. An empty query lists recent and pinned entries.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Find durable context saved by this extension.

query.description: Keywords describing the memory to retrieve.

limit.description: Maximum number of entries to return.

modelId.description: Optional model id used to include matching model-scoped entries.

includeExpired.description: Include expired entries for maintenance and review.

scope.description: Optionally restrict results to one memory scope.

languageModelTools.name: llamacpp_delete_memory
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Delete one durable shared memory entry by exact id when it is obsolete or incorrect. Never use this tool speculatively.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Remove an obsolete durable memory entry.

id.description: Exact id of the memory entry to delete.
